reason.message: If you see this, UTF działa.

test-case.name: should_create_route_resolve_and_recreate_flows_within_smoke_budget
test-case.output: Combat routing/resolution performance smoke: 12 characters, 800 entry->processor pairs, 80000 created flows after measurement, 800 active flows after measurement, 12.63 ms/tick average over 200 measured ticks.

test-case.name: should_tick_5000_long_casting_flows_without_resolution_within_smoke_budget
test-case.output: Combat steady-casting performance smoke: 12 characters, 5000 entry point items, 5000 initial active flows, 5000 created flows after measurement, 2.83 ms/tick average over 1000 measured ticks, 10 real seconds under test, 100 ticks/real second target (10 default ticks/real second x10).

test-case.name: should_carry_unused_ticks_to_next_item_in_same_flow_tick
test-case.output: [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=NewItemPlacedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.Inventory.Api.Event.Dto.NewItemPlacedDtoEvent [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=NewItemPlacedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.Inventory.Api.Event.Dto.NewItemPlacedDtoEvent [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=CombatCharacterCreatedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.CombatContext.Api.Event.CombatCharacterCreatedDtoEvent [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=CombatCharacterCreatedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.CombatContext.Api.Event.CombatCharacterCreatedDtoEvent [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=CombatContextCreatedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.CombatContext.Api.Event.CombatContextCreatedDtoEvent [CombatContext] Picked enemy: Defender(TeamB) [InventoryEvent] PUBLISH event=CharacterHpChangedDtoEvent, listeners=0, payload=MageFactory.Character.Api.Event.Dto.CharacterHpChangedDtoEvent [Combat] DamageIncoming processed for character=85828, rawDamage=MageFactory.Shared.Model.DamageToReceive, finalDamage=7, sourceType=ATTACK

test-case.output: Fired signal 'TestBindSignal.FooSignal' but no subscriptions found! If this is intentional then either add OptionalSubscriber() to the binding or change the default in ZenjectSettings

test-case.name: TestValidationErrorThrows
test-case.output: Saving results to: C:/Users/User/AppData/LocalLow/DefaultCompany/MrAngleGame\TestResults.xml
